subject: Delibird, a round white bird-like Pokemon, standing indoors holding a wrapped gift box near a fireplace surrounded by presents
description: A round, white bird-like Pokemon with a wide beak and small round eyes stands upright in a cozy indoor setting. It is holding a wrapped gift box with a ribbon. Behind it, a fireplace with active flames provides warm golden light. To the left and around the fireplace, multiple wrapped presents in various colors are stacked and arranged. A green plant or Christmas-style decoration is visible above the fireplace. The floor appears wooden or carpeted. The art style is soft and warm, watercolor-adjacent illustration. The entire scene reads as a winter holiday gift-giving moment — generous, cozy, celebratory.
foreground: Delibird holding a wrapped gift box, standing upright
background: Fireplace with flames; stacked wrapped presents; green plant decoration; warm interior
